ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot mimicking the action of steering a ferry.  The robot will use both arms, initially positioned as if holding a steering wheel. Then, the arms will make a turning motion, followed by a slight pause, and finally return to the initial position. This will create a cyclical animation reflecting the repetitive nature of steering a vessel.  The left arm will be slightly more active, mimicking the primary steering action, while the right arm will provide balance and support.

frames.beat: arms held out, ready to steer the ferry
turning the wheel left, a steady hand
the wheel is centered, pause in the journey
a sharp turn right, adjusting course
